QF.id: Retirement Planning Products: National Pension System (NPS)_26

question.text: At what age does rebalancing occur under the NPS Auto Choice lifecycle funds?

answer.text: On the last day of the financial year
On the first working day of each quarter

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Under Auto Choice, rebalancing of the portfolio is done automatically on the subscriber's birthday each year. **The Trap:** Many assume rebalancing is done on a calendar basis (Jan 1 or March 31). It is personalized to the subscriber's birthday. **Cross-Exam Context:** Birthday-based rebalancing ensures each subscriber's glide path is individually calibrated based on their exact age. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Inform clients about birthday-based rebalancing so they understand why their allocation may shift mid-year.
